patch.value: Analyze persisted telemetry and add remote analysis skill
Analyze already persisted telemetry in the remote stack and create a reusable skill on the remote host for privacy-preserving product-improvement analysis from collected pm CLI telemetry.

Aggregated persisted telemetry is analyzed without exposing raw user identifiers; remote analysis skill exists under the pm-cli operations folder with deterministic scripts and privacy guardrails; findings and verification are recorded on the pm item.

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search telemetry analysis skill collected user data --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Reusing telemetry epic pm-lnq3 as parent; net-new child task because no active item covers persisted telemetry analysis plus remote skill creation.

author: cursor-agent
message: Start persisted telemetry analysis and remote skill creation

value.note: remote telemetry analysis skill JSON smoke

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Completed persisted telemetry analysis and remote skill installation. Remote skill files are at /home/steve/container/pm-cli/skills/pm-telemetry-analysis with SKILL.md, scripts/analyze_telemetry.py, and references/schema.md. Aggregate report snapshot saved at /home/steve/container/pm-cli/docs/TELEMETRY_PRODUCT_ANALYSIS_2026-04-26.md. Report snapshot analyzed 11219 non audit-smoke events across 1341 installations, 5624 sessions, and 75 commands; linked smoke check later saw 11243 analyzed events, confirming live telemetry continued to persist during this work.

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Product-improvement findings from aggregated telemetry: update command has high failure rate driven by close-through-update and audit ownership restrictions; calendar today alias and aggregate status grouping are repeated user expectations; search has high p95 latency; telemetry payload lacks explicit pm CLI version and source classification, making real-user versus automation segmentation harder.

patch.value: Created remote pm-telemetry-analysis skill, generated privacy-safe aggregate report from persisted telemetry, documented data-derived product findings, and created or updated pm items for follow-up work.
Remote skill can analyze persisted telemetry in aggregate without exposing raw identifiers, and the collected data produces actionable product-improvement findings.

Remote skill installed under /home/steve/container/pm-cli/skills/pm-telemetry-analysis; report saved under /home/steve/container/pm-cli/docs/TELEMETRY_PRODUCT_ANALYSIS_2026-04-26.md; linked remote smoke test passed; findings created as pm-syt7, pm-3dd9, pm-bhmu and existing items pm-kglq, pm-jqgc, pm-300m were updated.

author: cursor-agent
